corrections.note: Body has Σαβασὰρ; transcript misreads the name as Σασαβὰρ.

corrections.location: V 10, end of v.17 into VI 1
corrections.correct: πρὸς ἡμᾶς. ιΤότε ι VI Δαρεῖος
corrections.note: Verse numerals are Greek iota, not Arabic numeral 1.
Right-margin line number 2 appears after βάρεϊ in the body line and is omitted in the transcription.

notes: Running head and apparatus match the scan. Body generally matches; one name misread and Greek verse numerals transcribed as Arabic 1. A right-margin line number '2' is visible after βάρεϊ in the body line.
